twelvelabs_people.description: Hooded individual, fully covered except for eyes, wearing a green hooded jacket, seated at a table in a courtroom-like setting, writing with a red pen. Appears restless at times, occasionally holds a phone to ear.

Elderly man, white hair, wearing a dark suit with a light-colored shirt, seen placing an object on a table and later writing with a black pen beside the hooded individual. Appears to be a legal or administrative figure.
Woman with long blonde hair and glasses, seated at a table in a courtroom setting, typing on a laptop. Appears focused, occasionally looks up off-camera. Wears a neutral-colored top and jeans.
Woman in a beige jacket pushing a shopping cart filled with papers, seen at the beginning of the video. She stops at a door held open by a man with glasses. Appears to be a staff member or clerk.
Man with glasses, wearing a dark jacket over a light-colored shirt, seen holding documents in front of the handcuffed individual during the initial hallway scene. Appears to be a police officer.
Man in a dark jacket over a light shirt, one of three men walking down the hallway. Hands cuffed behind him. Appears to be a detainee or suspect.
Two additional police officers in uniform, one leading the group with a hooded individual, followed by the original trio. Both wear standard police attire and carry equipment.
Older man in dark clothing, standing near a raised platform with two large computer monitors. Appears to be in a supervisory or technical role. Wears glasses and is seen observing the room.
Man with gray hair, wearing dark-colored clothes, seated at a table with hands clasped. Appears to be a legal or administrative official. Seen in multiple shots throughout the video.
Woman in black robes, seated at a desk near a computer, writing something down while looking toward the monitors. Appears to be a judge or court official.
Two formally attired men standing in a central area, facing forward, wearing judicial robes. They are part of a group that bows at the end of the proceedings.
